text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon's vigorous running strikes a chord
with the audience, renewing their impressions of
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She returns in an usually good mood. It seems as
though this could be a new start for us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her win, a serious look comes over her
face, and it seems as though she has something
important to discuss.
